title: Warm Crunchy German Minari Fritters
description: A funky, crumbly, indulgent German dish featuring minari, double-fry KFC style, shojin-friendly, perfect for a snack or dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine chopped minari, all purpose flour, cornstarch, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, mix together vegetable oil, chopped onion, and minced garlic.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Using a cookie scoop or spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into hot oil at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Increase the oil temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit and fry the fritters again for an additional 1-2 minutes, until extra crispy.
Remove the fritters from the oil and sprinkle with lemon juice.
Serve the Warm Crunchy German Minari Fritters hot and enjoy.
